For the participating hospitals in the PA model all inpatient and outpatient services (Facility/Technical 
Services) are considered part of the Model/Global Budget Services. Basically, all the services for a 
participating hospital would be global except for CAH Method II (85X) claim lines with revenue center 
codes 096X, 097X, and 098X. The CAH Method II professional services (rev codes 096X, 097X, and 098X)
